subcodes.first_line: We glorify from this station the leaf who hath clung to the Divine Lote-Tree and turned unto God, the Lord of mankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نکبر من هذا المقام علی الورقه التی تمسکت بالسدره و اقبلت الی الله مولی الانام
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
